title: Goodfellaz Vanilla+
description: Enhancing vanilla Minecraft with performance, immersion, and polish!
body:
![Goodfellaz Vanilla+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06acfe74bc8837b53dd3c0d01661897c8c353f8.png)

### Goodfellaz Vanilla+
The official modpack for the Goodfellaz SMP.

Our objective is to elevate Minecraft without changing it. We’ve kept the core progression and balance intact while boosting performance, visuals, and immersion.

### Demographic
If you love the classic survival loop but want a smoother, more polished experience, this is your pack. Goodfellaz Vanilla+ delivers a high-fidelity feel without the clutter of heavy content mods. Goodfellaz Vanilla+ presents a clean, immersive multiplayer experience for veterans and newcomers alike!

### Credentials
This is a curated collection of community-made mods. All rights and credit belong to the original authors.
